hero.tagline: The Pink City serves royal flavours — from Dal Baati Churma to saffron-laced sweets.
highlights: 10 curated food spots across Jaipur's heritage markets
Authentic Rajasthani thalis near Hawa Mahal & MI Road
From Masala Chowk jalebis to Chokhi Dhani feasts

foodSpots.dishName: Kulhad Chai, Bun Samosa, Samosa, Kachori, Bun Kachori
foodSpots.distanceFromTouristPlace: Located on MI Road market area
foodSpots.description: Gulab Ji Chai Wale is one of the most famous breakfast spots in Jaipur and a must-visit while exploring top tourist locations in Jaipur like MI Road and nearby heritage markets. Established in 1946, this legendary chai stall is known for thick aromatic elaichi chai served in kulhad along with bun samosa and kachori.
foodSpots.tips: Best visited early morning for breakfast chai experience. Locals usually start arriving from 4–5 AM.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Gulab Ji Chai Wale, Ganpati Plaza, MI Road, Jaipur, Rajasthan
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located on MI Road near Ganpati Plaza; easily reachable while exploring central Jaipur markets.

foodSpots.dishName: Neapolitan Pizza, Burrata Pizza, Panuozzo Sandwich, Tiramisu
foodSpots.distanceFromTouristPlace: Located in modern cafe hub area
foodSpots.description: Napoli Pizzeria Jaipur is known for authentic Neapolitan style sourdough pizza made using 24‑hour fermented dough and fresh mozzarella. Popular among tourists and cafe lovers looking for best pizza in Jaipur.
foodSpots.tips: Perfect lunch or dinner spot for pizza lovers exploring modern cafe culture in Jaipur.
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located in Jaipur cafe district; reachable by cab from major tourist areas.

foodSpots.description: Samrat Restaurant stall inside Masala Chowk is famous for fresh jalebi and traditional Jaipur sweets. Located inside the Masala Chowk street food hub near Albert Hall Museum.
foodSpots.tips: Best snack or dessert stop while exploring Albert Hall and Ram Niwas Garden.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Masala Chowk Food Court, Ram Niwas Garden, Jaipur, Rajasthan
foodSpots.routeDetails: Inside Masala Chowk food court in Ram Niwas Garden.

foodSpots.dishName: Rajasthani Thali, Bejad Roti, Gatte Ki Sabzi, Churma
foodSpots.description: Pawana Rajasthani Vyanjan offers an authentic Rajasthani thali including dal, gatte ki sabzi, churma and traditional bejad roti cooked on clay pot.
foodSpots.tips: Best lunch option if you want authentic Rajasthani thali experience.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Masala Chowk Food Court, Ram Niwas Garden, Jaipur
foodSpots.routeDetails: Inside Masala Chowk food court near Albert Hall Museum.

foodSpots.description: Gopal Singh Patasi Bhandar serves popular street snacks including pav bhaji and chaat inside the famous Masala Chowk food hub.
foodSpots.tips: Great evening snack stop after sightseeing around Albert Hall.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Masala Chowk Food Court, Ram Niwas Garden, Jaipur
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located inside Masala Chowk food court.

foodSpots.dishName: Tulsi Chai, Tadka Maggi, Biscuit Chai Combo
foodSpots.description: Tapri – The Tea House is one of the most popular chai cafes in Jaipur known for tulsi chai and relaxed rooftop cafe vibes.
foodSpots.tips: Perfect evening tea spot after visiting Central Park or exploring C-Scheme cafes.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Tapri – The Tea House, Central Park Area, C-Scheme, Jaipur
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located in C-Scheme near Central Park.

foodSpots.description: Natraj Restaurant is one of the most famous places for authentic Rajasthani thali including dal baati churma and traditional vegetarian dishes.
foodSpots.tips: Best lunch destination for authentic Rajasthani thali experience.
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located on MI Road in central Jaipur.

foodSpots.dishName: Paneer Ghewar with Rabri, Rajasthani Thali, Churma
foodSpots.description: LMB is one of the most iconic sweet shops and restaurants in Jaipur famous for paneer ghewar and traditional Rajasthani sweets.
foodSpots.tips: Best dessert stop while exploring Hawa Mahal and Johari Bazaar markets.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Laxmi Misthan Bhandar, Johari Bazaar, Pink City, Jaipur
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located inside Johari Bazaar market area.

foodSpots.dishName: Specialty Coffee, Latte, Cold Brew, Pastries
foodSpots.description: Curious Life Coffee Roasters is one of Jaipur’s best specialty coffee cafes known for freshly roasted beans and high quality brews.
foodSpots.tips: Great brunch or coffee break spot for cafe lovers.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Curious Life Coffee Roasters, Saroj Market, C-Scheme, Jaipur
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located in Saroj Market area of C-Scheme.

foodSpots.description: Chokhi Dhani offers a full Rajasthani cultural experience including traditional food, folk dance, camel rides and village activities.
foodSpots.tips: Best dinner experience with cultural entertainment and unlimited Rajasthani meal.
foodSpots.fullAddress: Chokhi Dhani Village Resort, Tonk Road, Jaipur
foodSpots.routeDetails: Located on Tonk Road highway outside Jaipur city center.
